title: Many economies rely on survey data that are more than five years old
subtitle: Average age of latest surveys in low-and middle-income economies
source: World Bank Statistical Performance Indicators
visdescription: This chart shows the average age of latest surveys. Many countries rely on survey data that are more than five years old.
keyFactLabel: of low- and middle-income economies, the most recent poverty survey  is more than five years old.
